audit_items.proof_trace: crc16.c contains zero free(), malloc(), or realloc() calls. The file consists solely of a static const lookup table (crc16tab[256]) and the pure computation function crc16(), which takes a const char* input parameter and stack-allocated locals only. The property's universal quantifier 'forall free(p) in crc16.c' has an empty domain, so the no-use-after-free and no-double-free assertions hold vacuously.
